generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our alliances, but we can't ignore the facts. Our partners aren't pulling their weight - just look at the crumbling NATO infrastructure in Eastern Europe. We're spending billions on defense while others cut corners. It's time to demand accountability before we stretch ourselves too thin. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
